titleStmt.title: SII 39.65: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 65. (A.R. No. 65 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA. •••••••••• ŚAKA 1464 (1541-42.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of tax-free (iṟaiyili) land as Tirunāmattukkāṇi to the same temple, by Vaṅgāramuḍaiyāṉ Pallavarāyar for the merit of a certain Periya-rāmappa-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakāttam 1000 4 100 6 10 4 mel cellā niṉṟa pilava varuṣam puraṭṭāti mātam 10 § poṉṉamarāpati
pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu velaṅkuṭi puravil kuṭikāṭṭu vayal cuṉeṇṭai vayal vāracci
kuṭikkāṭṭu puravukku Uḷpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattamum cettalaittiṭarum māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷa
maṟṟum Innāyaṉār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Āṇṭanayiṉār Āticaṇṭecura tevarkku tevatā
periyya Irāmappa nāyakkaṟkku taṉmamāka Innayiṉārkku Iṟaiyili tirunāmattuk kāṇi Āka Ikkuṭik
kāṟiyattukku kaṟtaṉ vaṅkāramuṭaiyār pallavarāyar Irāmappanāyakkar Ayyaṉukkup puṇṇiyamāka In
yattum m Iṟaṅkaṭku kuṭuttu Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka kaṭṭaḻai Iṭṭapaṭiyāle
kkuṭutta Ikkuṭikkāṭiraṇṭukkum pacāṉam kuṟuvai tiṉai varaku Eḷḷup payaṟu karumpu veṟṟikkoṭik karuṇai mañcaḷ Iñci vāḻai vaḻutalai pūcaṇi ceṅkaḻinir maṟṟum Eppeṟppa
ṭṭa payiṟ ceytu koṇṭu veṇṭum maraṅkaḷum vaittu puṉcekaḷum payirceytu koṇṭu nattamum kuṭi Ēṟṟikka koṇṭu māvaṭai puṟa l ciṟṟayam maṟṟum Ep
peṟpaṭṭa Aṉaittukkum cipaṇṭārattukku vāṭākkaṭamaiyāka Oṭṭu nicceyittu taṉṉāṭu vaḻaṅkum paṇam pattum tirukkoṭṭārakkālāl Aḷakkum pon_ 100 2 10 Ippa
ṇam pattum nellu nūṟṟirūpatiṉ kalamum celavaṟukku miṭattu pacāṉattukku taimmātam mutalāṇimātavarai yiṟppattāṟu Āṭi mātamutal mārkaḻimātavarai pa
ttil nālum cilavaṟuppārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kārāṇkiḻamaik kāṇiyāka pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷāṉa virapāṇṭiyak kāliṅka
rāyaṟku muṉ collappaṭṭa
Digital edition of SII 39.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
